privileged_info_summary: Confirmed that the task data is entirely synthetic, dynamically generated via setup_task.sh scripts. Verified that the target bookmark folders ('Oneworld', 'SkyTeam', 'Star Alliance', 'Hotels') perfectly match both the setup instructions and the verifier mapping. Confirmed the site exceptions ('concursolutions.com', 'amadeus.com'), the custom search engine keyword ('fa'), and the target URL fragment ('flightaware.com') against the setup specification and verifier.py evaluation logic.
